meta.style: 科技感、深色背景、赛博朋克微调、适合B站财经视频

prompts.description: 封面图：一个人站在巨大的AI机器人面前，角色反转——AI坐在老板椅上，人类站在工位前汇报工作。科技感办公室，蓝紫色调，赛博朋克风格。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一张概念插画，画中一个普通上班族站在一个巨大的发光AI机器人面前，AI机器人坐在老板椅上看着屏幕，人类拿着报告站在旁边汇报工作。背景是未来感的科技办公室，深蓝色和紫色霓虹灯光，赛博朋克风格，16:9宽屏构图，高清细节，电影感打光。
prompts.prompt_en: A conceptual illustration of an ordinary office worker standing before a giant glowing AI robot. The AI robot sits in a boss chair looking at a screen, while the human stands beside it holding a report, giving a work update. The background is a futuristic tech office with deep blue and purple neon lighting, cyberpunk style, 16:9 widescreen composition, high detail, cinematic lighting.

prompts.description: 一个少年在电脑前编程，屏幕上显示多个AI Agent窗口在同时工作，背后是传统20人办公室的虚影对比。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个穿着连帽衫的15岁亚洲少年坐在卧室书桌前，面对三块显示器，屏幕上显示代码编辑器和多个AI助手窗口在同时运行任务。少年的表情专注而轻松。在他身后的墙上是半透明的虚影，显示一个拥有20个工位的大型传统办公室，形成鲜明对比。暖色调台灯与屏幕冷光交融，写实摄影风格，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A 15-year-old Asian teenager in a hoodie sitting at a bedroom desk, facing three monitors showing a code editor and multiple AI assistant windows running tasks simultaneously. The teenager looks focused but relaxed. On the wall behind him is a semi-transparent ghost image showing a large traditional office with 20 workstations, creating a stark contrast. Warm desk lamp light blends with cool screen glow, photorealistic style, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 左右分屏对比。左边：人类在开车，AI坐在副驾驶指路（ChatGPT时代）。右边：人类坐在后排，AI在驾驶座自主驾驶（Agent时代）。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一幅左右分屏对比图。左半边：一个人在驾驶汽车，AI机器人坐在副驾驶座上手舞足蹈地指路，标题写着'ChatGPT时代'。右半边：同一个人悠闲地坐在汽车后排喝咖啡，AI机器人在驾驶座上自主驾驶，车窗外是未来城市夜景，标题写着'Agent时代'。整体科技感，扁平插画风格，干净背景，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A left-right split screen comparison. Left side: A person driving a car with an AI robot in the passenger seat gesturing directions, labeled 'ChatGPT Era'. Right side: The same person relaxed in the back seat drinking coffee while an AI robot drives autonomously, with a futuristic city nightscape through the window, labeled 'Agent Era'. Tech aesthetic, flat illustration style, clean background, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一个人坐在办公桌前，面前是超大弧形屏幕，上面排列着6-8个AI Agent的工作面板，像一个指挥中心。人手里拿着咖啡，像经理一样在监控和调度。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个现代办公空间，一个人坐在大型弧形显示器前，屏幕被分成6到8个面板，每个面板显示不同的AI Agent在工作——有的在写代码，有的在分析数据，有的在设计图形。这个人手里端着咖啡，表情冷静专注，像一个指挥官在调度军队。深色科技风格，蓝绿色调，电影感打光，16:9宽屏构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A modern workspace with a person sitting before a large curved monitor divided into 6-8 panels, each showing a different AI Agent working — some writing code, some analyzing data, some designing graphics. The person holds a coffee cup with a calm, focused expression, like a commander directing troops. Dark tech aesthetic, blue-green tones, cinematic lighting, 16:9 widescreen composition.

prompts.scene: 价值链断裂——乙方被压缩
prompts.description: 一条垂直的产业链链条，中间的'乙方'环节正在被AI挤压、消失。上方是甲方，下方是Agent+少量人才。中间的断裂处有AI粒子在流动。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一幅垂直产业链概念图。画面顶部是一个现代企业大楼代表甲方，底部是一个人和几个AI图标代表新世界。中间原本的乙方和外包公司层正在碎裂、被压缩，碎片化为发光的AI数据粒子向两侧飘散。整体深色背景，蓝白色调，信息图风格带3D效果，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A vertical supply chain concept diagram. At the top, a modern corporate building represents the client. At the bottom, a single person with several AI icons represents the new world. The middle layer of vendors and outsourcing companies is cracking and being compressed, fragments turning into glowing AI data particles floating away. Dark background, blue-white tones, infographic style with 3D effects, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一个三层金字塔。底层（红色）标注执行层，正在被AI侵蚀。中层（橙色）标注业务层，正在被压缩。顶层（绿色）标注决策层，发光且稳固。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个立体金字塔信息图，分三层。底层是红色半透明，标注'执行层'，正在被蓝色的AI数字流侵蚀和溶解。中层是橙色半透明，标注'业务层'，正在被压缩变薄。顶层是绿色发光，标注'决策层'，坚固且散发着光芒，上方有一个皇冠或钻石图标。深色背景，3D渲染风格，科技感，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A 3D pyramid infographic with three layers. The bottom layer is red translucent, labeled 'Execution Layer', being eroded and dissolved by blue AI digital streams. The middle layer is orange translucent, labeled 'Business Layer', being compressed and thinning. The top layer is green and glowing, labeled 'Decision Layer', solid and radiating light, with a crown or diamond icon above it. Dark background, 3D render style, tech aesthetic, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一个三维坐标系，三个轴分别标注：可流程化（Process）、依赖环境（Interaction）、需要担责（Responsibility）。不同行业以彩色圆点散布在不同象限，红色聚集在'高危区'，绿色聚集在'安全区'。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个三维坐标系信息图，三个发光的轴线分别标注'可流程化Process'、'依赖环境Interaction'、'需要担责Responsibility'。空间中散布着不同颜色的光点代表不同行业——红色光点聚集在'高危区'（高流程化、低环境依赖、低担责），绿色光点聚集在'安全区'（低流程化、高环境依赖、高担责）。每个光点旁有小标签标注行业名称。深色太空般背景，科幻数据可视化风格，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A 3D coordinate system infographic with three glowing axes labeled 'Process 流程化', 'Interaction 环境依赖', 'Responsibility 责任承担'. Different colored light points are scattered in the space representing different industries — red points clustered in the 'high risk' zone (high process, low interaction, low responsibility), green points in the 'safe' zone (low process, high interaction, high responsibility). Small labels next to each point show industry names. Dark space-like background, sci-fi data visualization style, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一张横向排列的行业冲击评估图，左侧红色高危行业（程序员、翻译、客服），中间橙色中危（设计、法律），右侧绿色低危（护理、心理咨询、艺术）。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一张横向排列的行业冲击评估信息图。左侧是红色区域，包含程序员、翻译、数据录入、客服等行业图标，标注'极高危'。中间是橙色和黄色区域，包含设计师、律师、教师等，标注'中高危'。右侧是绿色区域，包含护士、心理咨询师、艺术家等，标注'低危'。每个行业用简洁的图标表示，整体是扁平化设计，深色背景，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A horizontal industry impact assessment infographic. Left side is a red zone with icons for programmers, translators, data entry, customer service, labeled 'Extremely High Risk'. Middle is orange and yellow zone with designers, lawyers, teachers, labeled 'Medium-High Risk'. Right side is a green zone with nurses, therapists, artists, labeled 'Low Risk'. Each industry represented by a clean icon. Flat design, dark background, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一个办公室场景，员工面前屏幕显示Token消耗KPI进度条，进度条已经爆表变红。员工表情疲惫，背景是源源不断的Token数字在飞舞。旁边有一个快递员骑着电动车绕圈烧油的隐喻小图。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个灰暗压抑的办公室场景。一个疲惫的上班族盯着屏幕，屏幕上是一个KPI进度条，已经超出满格变成刺眼的红色，上面显示Token消耗量的数字在疯狂跳动。画面背景中，半透明的Token数字像雪花一样在空中飞舞。画面右下角有一个小的卡通插图——一个快递员骑着电动车在一个环形跑道上不停地绕圈，油表在空转。整体灰蓝色调，压抑氛围，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A gloomy, oppressive office scene. An exhausted worker stares at a screen showing a KPI progress bar that has exceeded maximum, turning bright red, with Token consumption numbers frantically jumping. In the background, semi-transparent Token numbers float like snowflakes. In the bottom right corner, a small cartoon inset shows a delivery rider on an electric scooter going in circles on a circular track, the fuel gauge spinning empty. Overall gray-blue tones, oppressive atmosphere, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一条从左到右的时间轴，标注2024-2028年。三个阶段用不同颜色区分：工具化（蓝色）、流程接管（橙色）、组织重构（绿色）。每个阶段上方有对应的小图标。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一条从左到右延伸的发光时间轴信息图。左侧2024-2025标注'工具化阶段'，蓝色区域，上方有一个锤子和扳手图标代表AI作为工具。中间2025-2026标注'流程接管阶段'，橙色区域，上方有一个齿轮和传送带图标代表AI接管流程。右侧2026-2028标注'组织重构阶段'，绿色区域，上方有一个公司组织架构图图标，结构在简化。深色背景，霓虹发光效果，简洁信息图风格，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A glowing timeline infographic extending left to right. Left section 2024-2025 labeled 'Tool Phase', blue zone, with a hammer and wrench icon above representing AI as a tool. Middle section 2025-2026 labeled 'Process Takeover Phase', orange zone, with a gear and conveyor belt icon representing AI taking over processes. Right section 2026-2028 labeled 'Org Restructuring Phase', green zone, with a company org chart icon showing simplifying structure. Dark background, neon glow effects, clean infographic style, 16:9 composition.

prompts.description: 一个人站在分叉路口，左边是'执行者'的死胡同（灰色），右边是通向'AI管理者'的宽阔道路（金色）。路边有路标指示不同岗位的转型方向。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一个人站在一个Y字形的分叉路口。左边是灰色的死胡同小路，路边标志写着'只会执行'，尽头是一堵墙。右边是金色的宽阔大道，通向远方明亮的未来城市，路边标志写着'AI管理者'。道路两侧有多个指示牌，分别写着'架构设计'、'产品思维'、'情感连接'、'跨界整合'等转型方向。整体是概念插画风格，明暗对比强烈，16:9构图。
prompts.prompt_en: A person standing at a Y-shaped fork in the road. The left path is a gray dead-end alley with a sign reading 'Only Execution', ending at a wall. The right path is a golden broad avenue leading to a bright futuristic city in the distance, with a sign reading 'AI Manager'. Along the right path, multiple signposts read 'Architecture Design', 'Product Thinking', 'Emotional Connection', 'Cross-domain Integration' and other transformation directions. Conceptual illustration style, strong light-dark contrast, 16:9 composition.

prompts.scene: 结尾——工业革命对比AI革命
prompts.description: 左右对比。左边是工业革命场景：蒸汽机、工厂、工人操作机器。右边是AI革命场景：AI Agent集群、现代人管理AI。中间有一个天平，两端平衡。
prompts.prompt_zh: 一幅左右对比的概念插画。左半边是工业革命时期，蒸汽机在工厂里轰鸣，工人在操作巨大的机械齿轮，暖棕色调。右半边是AI革命时期，一个现代人在全息屏幕前管理着一群发光的AI Agent图标，冷蓝色调。画面正中间有一个巨大的金色天平，两端保持平衡，象征两次革命的相似性。画面底部有一行小字：'历史在重演，只是这次轮到了脑力劳动'。16:9宽屏构图，电影感。
prompts.prompt_en: A left-right comparison conceptual illustration. Left half: The Industrial Revolution era with steam engines roaring in factories, workers operating massive mechanical gears, warm brown tones. Right half: The AI Revolution era with a modern person managing a group of glowing AI Agent icons before a holographic screen, cool blue tones. In the center, a massive golden scale is perfectly balanced, symbolizing the parallel between the two revolutions. 16:9 widescreen composition, cinematic feel.
